_comment_bequite: BeQuite hook wiring. Generated by `bequite init`. Do not edit by hand unless you know what you're doing — see .bequite/memory/constitution.md Article IV for the binding rules these hooks enforce. To extend, fork the relevant hook script under .claude/skills/bequite/hooks/ and reference the fork here.

hooks._comment: Iron Law IV (secrets) + master §19.4 — Tier-3 secret-shaped strings blocked at Edit/Write.
Iron Law VII (hallucination defense) + master §19.6 — verifies new imports exist in registries. PhantomRaven defense (Koi Security 2025).
Iron Law IV (destruction) + master §19.4 Tier-3 — destructive commands blocked unless explicit ADR override.
Auto-format the just-edited file. Warn-only on failure.
Lint the just-edited file. Warn-only; not blocking. Lint blocking belongs in CI / `bequite verify`.
Iron Law II — banned weasel words check + outstanding-task check. Forces continuation if violated.
Cost ceiling enforcement. Active once v0.7.0 receipts ship (no-op until then).
Iron Law III — print Memory Bank + ADR + state/ paths the agent must read on start.
Print active safety rails (cost ceiling, wall-clock ceiling, failure threshold) for the session.
